---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in AESTHETIX V-Track
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 126, Firefox 128, Safari 18]
- **Device**: [e.g., iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24, Desktop]
- **OS**: [e.g., iOS 18, Android 15, macOS 15, Windows 11]
- **App Version**: [e.g., v1.10.0 — check the header subtitle]

## 📝 Additional Context

- Does this happen every time or intermittently?
- Did this work before? If so, when did it break?
- Any relevant console errors? (Open DevTools → Console tab)
